notFoundDesc: This invitation link is invalid or has been removed.
expiredDesc: This invitation has expired. Please ask the team admin to send a new invitation.
alreadyAcceptedDesc: This invitation has already been used.
revokedDesc: This invitation has been cancelled by the team admin.
emailMismatchDesc: This invitation was sent to {inviteEmail}, but you're logged in as {userEmail}.
emailMismatchHelp: Please sign out and sign in with the correct email address, or ask the team admin to send a new invitation to your current email.
invitedAsRole: You've been invited to join as a {role}
selectOrgToLink: Choose which company to link with this advisor:
